{{Infobox character
| name = Weeping Dragon
| aliases = The Weeping Dragon
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[living lightning]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Striker techniques]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, dragon's breath technique that devours aura, [[Authority|authority]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Weeping Dragon]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, [[Dreadgod]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Stormcallers]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|upper atmosphere}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, sea of clouds}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Weeping Dragon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Weeping Dragon is a [[Dreadgod]], one of four immensely powerful entities. Unlike its siblings, this [[dragon]] retains memories of its former [[life]] and possesses a sense of superiority and pride. It is often associated with storms, as its presence agitates the wind, water, and lightning, frequently causing massive storms to follow its flight. The [[dragon]] typically resides in the upper atmosphere, resting upon a vast bed of clouds where it often dreams of its past. In these dreams, the [[dragon]] weeps, causing rain to fall upon the world below. In combat, the Weeping Dragon utilizes devastating abilities, including a specialized [[dragon]]'s breath and lightning-based attacks. It can manifest millions of smaller, serpentine [[Striker techniques]]—spirits made of blue and gold lightning—that act like a swarm to consume the spiritual power of targets. The [[dragon]] also possesses a commanding authority and can use its voice to issue commands like thunder. Its power is so immense that it has been known to reshape landscapes, cause landslides, and even strike scars across the moon. A dedicated cult known as the [[Stormcallers]] follows the Weeping Dragon. Members of this sect often utilize [[madra]] derived from the [[dragon]], which allows them to manipulate lightning and storm elements. This specialized [[madra]] carries a portion of the [[Dreadgod]]'s animating will and hunger. The Weeping Dragon has been involved in significant historical conflicts, including a battle that destroyed much of the [[Rosegold continent]] and an encounter with the [[Monarch]] [[Northstrider]], which left the latter severely wounded.}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Weeping Dragon]] was sighted in the [[Iceflower Continent]] last year.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Weeping Dragon]] sleeps in the upper atmosphere on a bed of clouds.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Weeping Dragon is depicted as an image of a [[dragon]] encircled by crackling lightning. During a confrontation with [[Northstrider]], this entity's power was demonstrated through the use of living lightning. The intensity of this lightning was great enough to trigger a landslide. Furthermore, an acolyte of the Weeping Dragon within the [[Stormcallers]] utilizes blue lightning in its name.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Weeping Dragon]] fought against [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is an image of a [[dragon]] surrounded by crackling lightning.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An acolyte of the [[Weeping Dragon]] in the [[Stormcallers]] uses blue lightning.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a creature that uses living lightning.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s lightning caused a landslide.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Weeping Dragon]] brought down the sky.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a cult or entity associated with the [[Stormcallers]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is an entity that [[Calan]] is standing with.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a source of lightning madra scales.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is one of the four [[Dreadgods]] depicted in a mural.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Weeping Dragon]] approached with a majestic roar.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a creature that can drift away looking for prey.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The entity known as the Weeping Dragon exists in a miniature [[Remnant]] form. While floating upon a bed of clouds, the [[dragon]] spends its time dreaming of the past and fears the moment it might wake. As the creature begins to become whole, its cry of joy results in the deaths of thousands of people.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A miniature [[Remnant]] version of the [[Weeping Dragon]] exists.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Weeping Dragon]] dreams of the past while floating on a bed of clouds.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a name for the Dragon.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Weeping Dragon]] fears waking from its dreams.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is becoming whole.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Dragon's cry of joy killed thousands of people.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Weeping Dragon is a feared concept and entity that manifests as a miles-long sapphire [[dragon]] swimming through a sea of clouds. This creature utilizes [[Striker techniques]] to produce tiny serpentine [[dragons]] made of blue-gold storm [[madra]], and its approach is signaled by the appearance of blue-and-gold lightning within the clouds. After attacking [[Ziel]]'s sect and leaving behind the wreckage of [[Sha Miara]]'s home, the entity is set to care for someone before [[Reigan Shen]] is permitted a turn. Currently, the Weeping Dragon is making its way toward [[Lindon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] uses [[Striker techniques]] that manifest as tiny serpentine [[dragons]] of blue-gold storm [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] attacked [[Ziel]]'s sect.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a feared entity or concept.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a miles-long sapphire [[dragon]] that swims over a sea of clouds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] left wreckage of [[Sha Miara]]'s home.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] will take care of someone before [[Reigan Shen]] gets a turn.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is headed toward [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The coming of the [[Weeping Dragon]] is signified by blue-and-gold lightning in the clouds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Weeping Dragon is a [[Dreadgod]] whose approaching storm clouds moved from the north toward the [[Ashwind continent]]. Having absorbed power from the deaths of the [[Silent King]] and the [[Slumbering Wraith]], this clever entity acted like a rampaging monster while possessing the internal nature of the [[Silent King]]. During a battle on the [[Rosegold continent]], the creature utilized hungry lightning, a gaze that could crush spirits, and an unstoppable breath technique composed of blue-and-yellow madra. Despite its ability to dodge predictions and command arrows away, the Weeping Dragon was eventually defeated in battle, leaving behind a golden jewel core binding as long as an arm.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">52</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] is preparing to fight the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is expected to do [[Reigan Shen]]'s job.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a target to be killed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s storm-clouds were approaching.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a [[Dreadgod]] whose clouds approach the [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is thousands of miles north.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a target [[Lindon]] is waiting for.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a [[Dreadgod]] that has absorbed power from the [[Silent King]]'s death.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The arrival of the [[Weeping Dragon]] is a condition for the duel.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] hopes [[Lindon]] will be food for the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] storm fills the northern sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is one of [[Yerin]]'s targets.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] was close.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s voice sounds like thunder.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is associated with hungry lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a being whose direct strike [[Yushi]] survived.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] intended to face the [[Weeping Dragon]] with seven companions.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a battle occurring on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is clever and acts like a rampaging monster.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s strength grew due to the demise of the [[Slumbering Wraith]] and the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is like the [[Wandering Titan]] on the outside but the [[Silent King]] on the inside.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] can cloud possibilities and dodge predictions.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Weeping [[Dragon's breath]] is the strongest offensive technique on the planet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Weeping [[Dragon's breath]] cannot be defended against, only evaded.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] clashed against the [[Weeping Dragon]] with [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] behind him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] commanded the [[Penance arrow]] away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] uses a [[dragon]]'s breath technique that devours [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s [[dragon]]'s breath involves blue-and-yellow madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a [[Dreadgod]] that has hidden threads of [[Fate]] behind clouds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] possesses a [[dragon]]'s pride that will not bend.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s gaze can crush spirits and strip away hope.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] drags dark clouds around everywhere.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is thrashing around the landscape like a dying snake.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s presence causes storm clouds and rain.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s eyes focus on [[Yerin]] and its rage causes wind and lightning storms.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] has a claw that trails lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s authority can crush [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s will is described as fierce as a storm and imposing as the greatest of [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] killed [[Ziel]]'s friends once before.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Dreadgod]] ([[Weeping Dragon]]) died.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] was a [[Dreadgod]] that was defeated in battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] attacked [[Yerin]] with the full force of its will to cause her injuries intentionally.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon's core binding]] is a golden jewel as long as [[Lindon]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] has a core binding.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] is a battle Emriss may have sensed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Information on the [[Weeping Dragon]] is limited.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|It is theoretically possible to create a method of transportation from the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Weeping [[Dragon's breath]] began to form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] has [[madra]] that an [[Overlord]]-level entity can almost handle a portion of.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] mentions the [[Weeping Dragon]] in relation to Del’rek's [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Weeping [[Dragon's breath]] slashed across the face of a moon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tidewalkers]] were devastated by the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Weeping Dragon]] left a scar across the face of the moon.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The blue scales of the [[Weeping Dragon]] wrap [[Lindon]] in a lightning-crackling embrace.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Pardon, but the Weeping Dragon isn’t coming here. It’s headed wherever I am, and I don’t intend to be here.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|"I will swear to duel you," he said at last. "But we fight to death, surrender, or the arrival of the Weeping Dragon."<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
